text:
Once upon a quiet afternoon in the small town of Blossomridge, there lived a humble shopkeeper named Margaret. She operated a cozy little bookstore filled with tales of adventure, romance, and mystery. Margaret was known not just for her vast collection but also for her uncanny ability to match the perfect book to every owner.

Margaret had always had a special place in her heart for a young girl named Lily. Every weekend, Lily would hop onto Margaret’s rocking horse before wandering through the store windows. She’d imagine herself being a pirate, a princess, a daring explorer, anything. Margaret loved watching those imagination flames flicker.

One rainy autumn day, with leaves crunching beneath her boots, Lily walked into the bookstore. Her hands were clutching a heavy raincoat, and she had a determined look in her eyes. She rummaged through the shelves until her eyes fell upon a book titled 'The Secret Map of Serenia.' The cover was old-fashioned, and the ink smelled faint
